description: REINFORCE on Gordon-Schaefer bioeconomic fishery model with Allee-effect tipping point. Demonstrates Nash Trap persistence in a scientifically grounded ecological model independent of our custom PGG. Based on Gordon(1954), Clark(1990), Scheffer(2009).

references: Gordon, H.S. (1954). The Economic Theory of a Common-Property Resource: The Fishery.
Schaefer, M.B. (1957). Some Considerations of Population Dynamics...
Scheffer, M. et al. (2009). Early-warning signals for critical transitions.
